notes:
4-12 MB RAM (depends on the model); Works very good; tested on a SuSE 6.2
Use the Kyocera PPD file for PostScript, Instructions
Use ljet4 for PCL5e
In case of duplex option use ljet4d for PCL5e and duplex
Using pxlmono for PCL6 may be the fastest way to get good printouts.

Maximum paper width: 8.5 inches / 21.6 cm (Standard format printer)

Printing engine speed: 12 pages/min
